text:
interfaces certainly not flapping, ccX are directly connected to our infrastructure. Three vlan are related with exchange point (shared vlan ), there is a lot of arp queries, but is normal level for such a connection. To be sure, I will start monitoring it. 

but as I post, when I set dpdk_lpm46 or radix46 it does not happend. The whole configuration is identical, I just change the algorithm.
